session.user:
Run `make fast-ci` and report whether it passes or fails. If it fails, show the specific errors.

session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make fast-ci to check CI status

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ✓ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired.

tool_use.param: Show last 100 lines of make fast-ci output

session.assistant: The tests passed but the build failed. Let me check what the Prettier issue is:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Show the Prettier code style issues

session.tool_result:
[[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix.
--- Markdown Check --- ✓ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired.
session.assistant: Let me get the actual list of files with issues:
session.tool_result: Checking formatting... [[33mwarn[39m] .claude/skills/skill-creator/assets/eval_review.html [[33mwarn[39m] .claude/skills/skill-creator/eval-viewer/viewer.html [[33mwarn[39m] .github/workflows/ci.yml [[33mwarn[39m] .worker-impl/plan-ref.json [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 6 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix.
session.assistant:
**make fast-ci FAILED**
The build exited with code 1 due to Prettier formatting issues. While all tests passed successfully (6020 tests for erk, 136 for erk-dev, 115 for erk-statusline, and 26 for erk-mcp), the CI check failed because 6 files have formatting style issues:
**Files with Prettier formatting issues:** 1. `.claude/skills/skill-creator/assets/eval_review.html` 2. `.claude/skills/skill-creator/eval-viewer/viewer.html` 3. `.github/workflows/ci.yml` 4. `.worker-impl/plan-ref.json` 5. `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 6. `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
These files need to be reformatted with Prettier to pass CI. The linting (ruff), type checking (ty), unit tests, and markdown checks all passed.
